member.name: T:JYUSB1202.ScalingCoefficients
member.summary: 将原始Raw数据转换为工程单位（电压值）的换算因子。

member.name: M:JYUSB1202.JYUSB1202ProductCal.InitCalInfo(JYUSB1202.JYUSB1202Device,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: 从板卡EEPROM读取指定类型的校准数据至缓冲区，若板卡不包含该类型的有效校准数据，则创建新校准数据。

member.name: M:JYUSB1202.JYUSB1202ProductCal.SetEnvironmentParam(JYUSB1202.JYUSB1202Device,System.Int16)
member.summary: 更新指定类型校准数据的温度信息。

member.name: M:JYUSB1202.JYUSB1202ProductCal.SaveToEEPROM(JYUSB1202.JYUSB1202Device)
member.summary: 将缓冲区中指定类型的校准数据写入板卡EEPROM。

member.name: M:JYUSB1202.JYUSB1202ProductCal.SetAIDCCoef(JYUSB1202.JYUSB1202Device,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Single[])
member.summary: 更新缓冲区中指定AI通道的一组DC校准系数。

member.name: M:JYUSB1202.JYUSB1202Device.GetCapability(System.Int32)
member.summary: Obtain capability information of the device in the specified slot without opening the device. Return the default value when the specified device is not found.

member.name: M:JYUSB1202.JYUSB1202Device.GetCapability(System.String)
member.summary: Obtain capability information of the device in the specified alias name without opening the device. Return the default value when the specified device is not found.

member.name: M:JYUSB1202.JYUSB1202Device.Release
member.summary: 关闭AD设备,禁止传输,并释放资源，该函数自动在类的析构函数中执行

member.name: M:JYUSB1202.JYUSB1202Device.Finalize
member.summary: 析构函数，释放硬件资源

members.member: 获取当前已启用通道的电压换算因子。

member.name: M:JYUSB1202.JYUSB1202AITask.#ctor(System.Int32)
member.summary: Constructor, Used to create an AI task by a slot number

member.name: M:JYUSB1202.JYUSB1202AITask.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Constructor. Used to create an AI task by a board name.
member.param: Board name(device alias), set by device manager

member.name: P:JYUSB1202.JYUSB1202AITask.Channels
member.summary: List of AI channels,(1202 support 4 channel)

member.name: P:JYUSB1202.JYUSB1202AITask.SampleRate
member.summary: Sample rate per channel. Maximum sample rate is 250K for single channel, 250K/N for multichannel (N) The defalut sample rate = 10k You can read this property to obtain the sample rate that will actually take effect in the current configuration.

member.name: P:JYUSB1202.JYUSB1202AITask.SamplesToAcquire
member.summary: Number of samples to be read per channel. Only valid when is .

member.name: P:JYUSB1202.JYUSB1202AITask.BufLenInSamples
member.summary: Number of samples per channel can be storage in the buffer, the Proprety must be less than or equal to this value.

member.name: P:JYUSB1202.JYUSB1202AITask.AvailableSamples
member.summary: Number of samples per channel that can be read in the buffer . Valid when is NOT .

member.name: P:JYUSB1202.JYUSB1202AITask.TransferedSamples
member.summary: The number of samples that have been transfered from the local buffer (per channel). Valid when is NOT .

member.name: M:JYUSB1202.JYUSB1202AITask.AddChannel(System.Int32,System.Double,System.Double,JYUSB1202.AITerminal,JYUSB1202.AICoupling,System.Boolean)
member.param: channel's physical number ，chnId=-1, add all channels。
lower range limit for the channel，-10V,-5V defalut -10
higher range limit for the channel，10V,5V defalut 10

member.name: M:JYUSB1202.JYUSB1202AITask.AddChannel(System.Int32[],System.Double,System.Double,JYUSB1202.AITerminal,JYUSB1202.AICoupling,System.Boolean)
member.param: a group of channel physical numbers
lower range limit for the channel，-10V,-5V defalut -10
higher range limit for the channel，10V,5V defalut 10

member.name: M:JYUSB1202.JYUSB1202AITask.AddChannel(System.Int32[],System.Double[],System.Double[],JYUSB1202.AITerminal[],JYUSB1202.AICoupling[],System.Boolean[])
member.param: a group of channel physical numbers
lower range limit for the channel，-10V,-5V
higher range limit for the channel，10V,5V

member.name: M:JYUSB1202.JYUSB1202AITask.RemoveChannel(System.Int32)
member.summary: Delete the specified channel number. If it is -1, delete all channels.

member.name: M:JYUSB1202.JYUSB1202AITask.ReadData(System.IntPtr,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Read one or multi-channel data by columns and store it in a data buffer. The buffer is pointed by C# data type IntPtr.
member.param: Number of samples per channel to read
timeout before generating error message, uint is ms。 timeout =-1 keep waiting until finish.

member.name: M:JYUSB1202.JYUSB1202AITask.ReadData(System.Double[0:,0:]@,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Read the multi-channel data by columns and store it in a data buffer. Each channel is represented by one column of data.
member.param: Number of samples per channel to read
timeout before generating error message, uint is ms。 timeout =-1 keep waiting until finish.

member.name: M:JYUSB1202.JYUSB1202AITask.ReadData(System.Double[0:,0:]@,System.Int32)
member.summary: Read the multi-channel data by columns and store it in a data buffer. Each channel is represented by one column of data.
member.param: timeout before generating error message, uint is ms。 timeout =-1 keep waiting until finish.

member.name: M:JYUSB1202.JYUSB1202AITask.ReadData(System.Double[]@,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Read the one channel data and store it in a data buffer.
member.param: Number of samples per channel to read
timeout before generating error message, uint is ms。 timeout =-1 keep waiting until finish.

member.name: M:JYUSB1202.JYUSB1202AITask.ReadData(System.Double[]@,System.Int32)
member.summary: Read the one channel data and store it in a data buffer.
member.param: timeout before generating error message, uint is ms。 timeout =-1 keep waiting until finish.

member.name: M:JYUSB1202.JYUSB1202AITask.ReadRawData(System.IntPtr,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Read one or multi-channel raw data by columns and store it in a data buffer. The buffer is pointed by C# data type IntPtr.
member.param: Number of samples per channel to read
timeout before generating error message, uint is ms。, timeout =-1 keep waiting until finish.

member.name: M:JYUSB1202.JYUSB1202AITask.ReadRawData(System.Int16[0:,0:]@,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Read the multi-channel raw data by columns and store it in a data buffer. Each channel is represented by one column of data.
member.param: Number of samples per channel to read
timeout before generating error message, uint is ms。 timeout =-1 keep waiting until finish.

member.name: M:JYUSB1202.JYUSB1202AITask.ReadRawData(System.Int16[0:,0:]@,System.Int32)
member.summary: Read the multi-channel raw data by columns and store it in a data buffer. Each channel is represented by one column of data.
member.param: timeout before generating error message, uint is ms。 timeout =-1 keep waiting until finish.

member.name: M:JYUSB1202.JYUSB1202AITask.ReadRawData(System.Int16[]@,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Read the one channel raw data and store it in a data buffer.
member.param: Number of samples per channel to read
timeout before generating error message, uint is ms。 timeout =-1 keep waiting until finish.

member.name: M:JYUSB1202.JYUSB1202AITask.ReadRawData(System.Int16[]@,System.Int32)
member.summary: Read the one channel raw data and store it in a data buffer.
member.param: timeout before generating error message, uint is ms。 timeout =-1 keep waiting until finish.

member.name: M:JYUSB1202.JYUSB1202AITask.GetRecordPreviewData(System.Double[0:,0:]@,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Preview multi-channel data when streaming is in progress. Each column represents one channel.
member.param: Number of preview samples per channel
timeout before generating error message, uint is ms。 timeout =-1 keep waiting until finish.

member.name: M:JYUSB1202.JYUSB1202AITask.GetRecordPreviewData(System.Double[0:,0:]@,System.Int32)
member.summary: Preview multi-channel data when streaming is in progress. Each column represents one channel.
member.param: timeout before generating error message, uint is ms。 timeout =-1 keep waiting until finish.

member.name: M:JYUSB1202.JYUSB1202AITask.GetRecordPreviewData(System.Double[]@,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Preview one channel data when streaming is in progress.
member.param: Number of preview samples per channel
timeout before generating error message, uint is ms。 timeout =-1 keep waiting until finish.

member.name: M:JYUSB1202.JYUSB1202AITask.GetRecordPreviewData(System.Double[]@,System.Int32)
member.summary: Preview one channel data when streaming is in progress.
member.param: timeout before generating error message, uint is ms。 timeout =-1 keep waiting until finish.

member.name: M:JYUSB1202.JYUSB1202AITask.GetRecordStatus(System.Double@,System.Boolean@)
member.summary: Read one sample for all channels in register . Available when is
get the streaming status. Available when is
member.param: recordDone = false :streaming is not over.recordDone = true :streaming is over.

member.name: M:JYUSB1202.JYUSB1202AITask.WaitUntilDone(System.Int32)
member.summary: Waiting until current task to complete.
member.param: timeout = -1, wait until done, other positive number N, wait N mS. If not done, a timeout error generate.

member.name: M:JYUSB1202.JYUSB1202AITask.GetScalingCoefficients
member.summary: 在Commit()或Start()之后调用，获取当前任务已添加通道的电压换算因子，用于将Raw数据转换为电压值。

member.name: P:JYUSB1202.AIChannel.RangeLow
member.summary: Low range limit an AI channel.

member.name: P:JYUSB1202.AIChannel.RangeHigh
member.summary: High range limit an AI channel.

member.name: M:JYUSB1202.AIChannel.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Double,System.Double,JYUSB1202.AITerminal,JYUSB1202.AICoupling,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Constructor to create an AIChnParam task object.
member.param: Low range limit an AI channel.
High range limit an AI channel.

member.name: P:JYUSB1202.AISampleClock.Source
member.summary: AI Sample Clock Source. enum Internal/External. The default value is .

member.name: P:JYUSB1202.AISampleClock.External
member.summary: External Sample Clock Configuration. Valid when is .

member.name: T:JYUSB1202.AITrigger
member.summary: Constructor to create an AITrigger task object. Used to build AI Trigger

member.name: P:JYUSB1202.AITrigger.Type
member.summary: AI trigger type. enum Analog/Digital/Immediate/Soft. The default value is .

member.name: P:JYUSB1202.AITrigger.Digital
member.summary: Digital Trigger Congfiguration. Valid when is .

member.name: P:JYUSB1202.AIRecord.Length
member.summary: User specified stream length in second. Only when is .

member.name: M:JYUSB1202.AISignalExport.Add(JYUSB1202.AISignalExportSource,System.Collections.Generic.List{JYUSB1202.SignalExportDestination})
member.summary: Export one Signal to Mutil Desination

member.name: M:JYUSB1202.JYUSB1202CITask.#ctor
member.summary: Constructor. Used to create an CI task by a slot number.

member.name: M:JYUSB1202.JYUSB1202CITask.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Constructor. Used to create an m task by a board name.
member.param: Board name(device alias), set by device manager

member.name: M:JYUSB1202.JYUSB1202CITask.ReadSinglePoint(System.UInt32@)
member.summary: Read a signle count value from register, Available when is , or

member.name: M:JYUSB1202.JYUSB1202CITask.ReadSinglePoint(System.Double@,System.Int32)
member.summary: Read a signle frequency value or period value from register. Valid when is or .
member.param: Measurement value. Indicates frequency in Hz when is ; Indicates period is seconds when is .
Timeout (ms). Wait until the measurement is completed or timed out. If it times out, a timeout exception will be thrown. When the value is -1, it never times out.

member.name: M:JYUSB1202.JYUSB1202CITask.ReadSinglePoint(System.Double@,System.Double@,System.Int32)
member.summary: Read a signle measurement of pulse's duration value, or two-edge separtion value (two results at a time) from register. Available when is or .
member.param: Measurement Value 1. Indicates low level duration in seconds when is ；Indicates separation between the rising edge of the first signal and the rising edge of the second signal when is .
Measurement Value 2. Indicates high level duration in seconds when is ；Indicates seperation between previous rising edge of the second signal and current rising edge of the first signal when is .
Timeout (ms). Wait until the measurement is completed or timed out. If it times out, a timeout exception will be thrown. When the value is -1, it never times out.

member.name: P:JYUSB1202.EdgeCounting.OutEvent
member.summary: Edge counting output event. A pulse will be generated when the count value reaches specified threshold

member.name: T:JYUSB1202.EdgeCntOunEvtIdleState
member.summary: Output idle state when the event has not occurred.

member.name: T:JYUSB1202.EdgeCountingOutEvent
member.summary: Edge counting output event configuration class

member.name: P:JYUSB1202.EdgeCountingOutEvent.IdleState
member.summary: Output idle state when the event has not occurred. The default value is

member.name: P:JYUSB1202.EdgeCountingOutEvent.Threshold
member.summary: Comparison threshold. The default value is 2^32-1

member.name: P:JYUSB1202.PauseTrigger.ActivePolarity
member.summary: Pause trigger active polarity. The default value is , means the pause trigger is disabled.

member.name: P:JYUSB1202.QuadEncoder.ZReloadEnabled
member.summary: In Encoder mode ,the Z signal enable

member.name: M:JYUSB1202.JYUSB1202COTask.#ctor
member.summary: Constructor. Used to create an CO task by a slot number.

member.name: M:JYUSB1202.JYUSB1202COTask.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Constructor. Used to create an CO task by a board name.
member.param: Board name(device alias), set by device manager

member.name: F:JYUSB1202.JYUSB1202COTask._pulse
member.summary: 为时生效的输出脉冲参数

member.name: P:JYUSB1202.JYUSB1202COTask.IdleState
member.summary: Idle state when pulse output before start and after stop.

member.name: M:JYUSB1202.JYUSB1202COTask.WriteSinglePoint(JYUSB1202.COPulse)
member.summary: Write a single pulse parameter to the register. This function is also available after starting the task when the number of pulses being sent is infinite.

member.name: M:JYUSB1202.JYUSB1202COTask.WaitUntilDone(System.Int32)
member.summary: Waiting until current task to complete.
member.param: timeout = -1, wait until done, other positive number N, wait N mS. If not done, a timeout error generate.

member.name: T:JYUSB1202.COIdleState
member.summary: Idle state when pulse output before start and after stop.

member.name: M:JYUSB1202.COPulse.#ctor(JYUSB1202.COPulseType,System.Double,System.Double,System.Int32)
member.param: Parameter 1. Frequency (Hz) when constructed as ; High duration in seconds when constructed as ; High ticks of the clock when constructed as .
Parameter 1. Duty cycle (greater than 0 and less than 1) when constructed as ; Low duration in seconds when constructed as ; Low ticks of the clock when constructed as .
Number of pulses. When the value is -1 (indicating that the number of pulses is infinite), pulses will be continuously sent until requested to stop.

member.name: P:JYUSB1202.COPulse.IsCountUnlimited
member.summary: 待发送的脉冲数是否为无限

member.name: F:JYUSB1202.COPulseType.DutyCycleFrequency
member.summary: Configure CO output pulse according to its DutyCycle and Freqency.

member.name: F:JYUSB1202.COPulseType.HighLowTime
member.summary: Configure CO output pulse according to duration of its high/low voltage levels.

member.name: F:JYUSB1202.COPulseType.HighLowTick
member.summary: Configure CO output pulse according to its high/low tick level.

member.name: M:JYUSB1202.JYUSB1202DITask.#ctor
member.summary: Constructor. Used to create an DItask by a slot number.

member.name: M:JYUSB1202.JYUSB1202DITask.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Constructor. Used to create an DI task by a board name.
member.param: Board name(device alias), set by device manager

member.name: P:JYUSB1202.JYUSB1202DITask.Channels
member.summary: List of DI channels,(1202 support 8 lines)

member.name: M:JYUSB1202.JYUSB1202DITask.AddChannel(System.Int32[])
member.param: an array of line numbers of added lines.

member.name: M:JYUSB1202.JYUSB1202DITask.RemoveChannel(System.Int32)
member.summary: Delete the specified line number .If it is -1, delete all lines.

member.name: M:JYUSB1202.JYUSB1202DITask.ReadSinglePoint(System.Boolean@,System.Int32)
member.summary: Read one sample for specified line in register.

member.name: M:JYUSB1202.JYUSB1202DITask.ReadSinglePoint(System.Boolean[]@)
member.summary: Read one sample for all lines in register
member.param: Values read. Buffer size >= number of lines.

member.name: M:JYUSB1202.JYUSB1202DOTask.#ctor
member.summary: Constructor. Used to create an DOtask by a slot number.

member.name: M:JYUSB1202.JYUSB1202DOTask.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Constructor. Used to create an DO task by a board name.
member.param: Board name(device alias), set by device manager

member.name: P:JYUSB1202.JYUSB1202DOTask.Channels
member.summary: List of DO channels,(1202 support 8 lines)

member.name: M:JYUSB1202.JYUSB1202DOTask.AddChannel(System.Int32[])
member.param: an array of line numbers of added lines.

member.name: M:JYUSB1202.JYUSB1202DOTask.RemoveChannel(System.Int32)
member.summary: Delete the specified line number .If it is -1, delete all lines.

member.name: M:JYUSB1202.JYUSB1202DOTask.WriteSinglePoint(System.Boolean,System.Int32)
member.summary: Write one sample to the specified line in register.

member.name: M:JYUSB1202.JYUSB1202DOTask.WriteSinglePoint(System.Boolean[])
member.summary: write one sample to all lines in register .
member.param: Data to be written.Buffer size >= number of lines。

member.name: F:JYUSB1202.JYUSB1202Miscellaneous._devices
member.summary: List to keep param of all devices.

member.name: M:JYUSB1202.JYUSB1202Miscellaneous.SetAICalibrationState(JYUSB1202.JYUSB1202Device,System.Boolean)
member.param: AI calibration of device is disabled when set as true. The default value is false.

member.name: M:JYUSB1202.JYUSB1202Miscellaneous.GetAICalibrationState(JYUSB1202.JYUSB1202Device)
member.summary: Return true if AI calibration of device is disabled.
member.returns: Return true if AI calibration of device is disabled.

member.name: M:JYUSB1202.JYUSB1202Miscellaneous.SetAOCalibrationState(JYUSB1202.JYUSB1202Device,System.Boolean)
member.param: AO calibration of device is disabled when set as true. The default value is false.

member.name: M:JYUSB1202.JYUSB1202Miscellaneous.GetAOCalibrationState(JYUSB1202.JYUSB1202Device)
member.summary: Return true if AO calibration of device is disabled.
member.returns: Return true if AO calibration of device is disabled.

member.name: P:JYUSB1202.DeviceMiscellaneousParam.DisableAICalibration
member.summary: AI Calibration is disabled when this property is true. The default value is false.

member.name: P:JYUSB1202.DeviceMiscellaneousParam.DisableAOCalibration
member.summary: AO Calibration is disabled when this property is true. The default value is false.
